top_signals.title: Oil Suffers Worst Run This Year as Hormuz Deal Reshapes Outlook
top_signals.summary: Oil headed for its longest losing streak this year as the US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz boosted expectations for a revival in supply, with leading Wall Street banks reducing their price forecasts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Live markets: Bitcoin ETFs bled cash Monday while every other crypto ETF gained
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: India touts new ballistic missile defense prowess after tests
top_signals.summary: India aims to joint a small club of countries capable of bringing down incoming missiles with technology made domestically.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OptinMonster WordPress plugin hacked in CDN supply-chain attack
top_signals.summary: WordPress plugins OptinMonster, TrustPulse, and PushEngage have been compromised in a supply-chain attack impacting Awesome Motive-s content distribution network (CDN). [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
